debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
identDistrib_neg_X : ∀ (i : ι), IdentDistrib (X i) (-X i) μ μ
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
this : DecidableEq ι
integrable_prod_norm_X : ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ
integrable_prod_inner_X :
  ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, inner ℝ (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)) μ
EvenIndex : (Fin m → ι × ι) → Prop := fun I => ∀ i ∈ A, Even ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card)
⊢ ∑ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A with EvenIndex I,
      ∫ (ω : Ω), ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ ({k | (I k).1 = i}.card + {k | (I k).2 = i}.card) ∂μ =
    ∑ w ∈ A.piAntidiag (2 * m) with ∀ i ∈ A, 2 ∣ w i, ↑(multinomial A w) * ∫ (ω : Ω), ∏ i ∈ A, ‖X i ω‖ ^ w i ∂μ

rw [sum_filter]
      conv_lhs => 
        arg 2
        ext I
        rw [← ite_and]
      rw [← sum_filter]
      let weight (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (i : ι) : ℕ := #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}
      have weight_sum (I : Fin m → ι × ι) (hI : I ∈ piFinset fun _ => A ×ˢ A) : 
          ∑ i ∈ A, weight I i = 2 * m := by
        simp only [weight, ← sum_add_distrib]
        have h1 : ∑ i ∈ A, #{k | (I k).1 = i} = m := by
          rw [← card_fin m]
          refine card_eq_sum_card_fiberwise ?_
          intro k _
          simp only [mem_filter, mem_univ, true_and]
          have := (mem_piFinset.mp hI k)
          simp only [mem_product] at this
          exact this.1
        have h2 : ∑ i ∈ A, #{k | (I k).2 = i} = m := by
          rw [← card_fin m]
          refine card_eq_sum_card_fiberwise ?_
          intro k _
          simp only [mem_filter, mem_univ, true_and]
          have := (mem_piFinset.mp hI k)
          simp only [mem_product] at this
          exact this.2
        omega

rw [sum_comm]
      refine sum_nbij (fun I _ i => #{k | (I k).1 = i} + #{k | (I k).2 = i}) ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
      · intro I hI

          have h2 : (I k).2 ∈ A := hI.1.2 k (mem_univ _)
          rw [sum_eq_single (I k).1, sum_eq_single (I k).2] <;>
            simp (config := { contextual := true }) [h1, h2, card_filter_eq_ite]

          simp [h1, h2]

        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piFinset, mem_product, forall_and] at hI hJ
        funext i
        have := congr_fun hIJ i
        simp only at this
        exact this

        simp only [mem_filter, mem_piAntidiag] at hw
